channel.title: NKE — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on NKE (Nike) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: EXITED NKE (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) exited NKE in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Polen Capital: EXITED NKE (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) exited NKE in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED NKE (+72%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added NKE in Q4 2025 · 1.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED NKE (+24%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added NKE in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED NKE (+20%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added NKE in Q4 2025 · 6.4% of portfolio. Doubling down on the Nike turnaround thesis.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Ackman)

item.title: Terry Smith: TRIMMED NKE (-6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Terry Smith (Fundsmith) trimmed NKE in Q4 2025 · 2.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Terry Smith)

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED NKE (+22%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added NKE in Q3 2025 · 5.3% of portfolio. Nike turnaround thesis — first big add.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Ackman)

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED NKE (+18%) · Q2 2025
